description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
OR the All-Star Game is on the schedule
AND FOX broadcasters are assigned
AND the user has one of the following entitlements: MLBALL, MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS, MLBVIDEOAR
AND the user is authorized for FOX MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the AWAY (National) feed level foxAuthRequired = true

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a game tile for a FOX Postseason game tile
OR the user selects the All-Star Game tile
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Select modal displays
AND the feed button displays
AND the user is able to initiate playback
